final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing illustration of a dreamy underwater fairy-tale world.

Style/medium: needs a dreamy fairy-tale aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a mermaid swimming among coral reefs, glowing jellyfish, and a sunken ship with treasure
Scene/backdrop: must include an underwater world with light rays penetrating from the sea surface
Lighting/mood: needs a dreamlike atmosphere with light rays from above — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, dreamlike direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
